message.content:
# ResumePro UI Design Detailed Description

## 1. Overall Layout Structure

The ResumePro interface follows a three-column layout with a dark, gradient background:

- **Left Sidebar**: Contains navigation menu and premium upgrade section
- **Central Content Area**: Displays the resume preview and editing tools
- **Right Sidebar**: Contains the resume editing form and controls

The layout uses a dark blue/navy background with purple gradient accents, creating a modern, professional appearance.

## 2. UI Components

### Left Sidebar Components:
- **ResumePro Logo** (top left): White text with a subtle icon
- **Navigation Menu**:
  - Editor (active, highlighted with purple background)
  - Templates
  - Examples
  - Cover Letters
  - My Resumes
  - AI Assistant (with "New" badge)
  - Settings
- **Premium Upgrade Section**:
  - Crown icon
  - "Go Premium" heading
  - Description text
  - "Upgrade Now" button with arrow icon
- **User Profile** (bottom):
  - User avatar
  - Name "Olivia Rhye"
  - Email "olivia@example.com"
  - Dropdown arrow

### Top Header:
- **Back Arrow** (left)
- **"My Resume"** title
- **"Saved just now"** status indicator
- **Action Buttons** (right):
  - Preview (eye icon)
  - PDF (document icon)
  - Download (download icon, purple gradient background)

### Central Content Area:
- **Resume Preview** (main content):
  - Profile section with photo, name, title, and bio
  - Experience section with job history
  - Skills section with progress bars
  - Education section
  - Tools section with skill tags
  - Languages section with proficiency indicators

### Right Sidebar:
- **Edit Tabs**:
  - Content (active)
  - Design
  - Templates
- **Form Fields**:
  - Personal Information section
  - Various input fields (text inputs, textareas)
  - Rich text editor toolbar (B, I, U, list, link icons)
  - Skills section with progress bars and remove buttons
  - "Add Skill" button

## 3. Color Scheme and Styling

- **Background**: Dark navy blue (#1a1f36) with purple gradient accents
- **Primary Accent**: Purple (#6c5ce7) for active elements and buttons
- **Secondary Accent**: Light blue/purple for hover states
- **Text Colors**:
  - White for primary text
  - Light gray (#a0a0a0) for secondary text
  - Dark gray for form labels
- **Borders**: Subtle 1px borders with rgba(255,255,255,0.1)
- **Shadows**: Soft shadows for cards and buttons
- **Gradients**: Purple-to-blue gradients for buttons and active states

## 4. Typography and Text Content

- **Font**: Sans-serif (likely Inter or similar)
- **Text Hierarchy**:
  - Large bold text for names and section headers
  - Medium text for job titles and descriptions
  - Small text for dates and details
- **Resume Content**:
  - Name: "Olivia Rhye" (large, bold)
  - Title: "Senior Product Designer"
  - Bio: "Product designer with 6+ years of experience..."
  - Experience entries with company names, dates, and bullet points
  - Skills with progress bars
  - Education details
  - Contact information

## 5. Navigation Elements

- **Left Sidebar Navigation**: Vertical menu with icons for each section
- **Top Navigation**: Back button and action buttons
- **Tab Navigation** (right sidebar): Three tabs for editing modes
- **Dropdown Menu**: User profile at bottom of sidebar

## 6. Icons and Badges

- **Navigation Icons**: Editor (pencil), Templates (document), Examples (image), Cover Letters (document), My Resumes (folder), AI Assistant (robot), Settings (gear)
- **Action Icons**: Preview (eye), PDF (document), Download (arrow down)
- **Badge**: "New" badge on AI Assistant menu item
- **Skill Icons**: X buttons for removing skills
- **Rich Text Editor Icons**: Bold, italic, underline, list, link

## 7. Resume Preview/Document Area

The resume preview shows a professional layout with:

- **Profile Section**:
  - Circular profile photo
  - Name and title
  - Bio paragraph
  - Contact information (email, phone, location, LinkedIn, website)

- **Experience Section**:
  - Job titles with companies and dates
  - Bullet points describing responsibilities and achievements

- **Skills Section**:
  - Skill names with horizontal progress bars
  - Visual representation of proficiency levels

- **Education Section**:
  - Degree and institution
  - Dates and location

- **Tools Section**:
  - Skill tags (Figma, Sketch, Adobe XD, etc.)

- **Languages Section**:
  - Language names with proficiency indicators (dots)

## 8. Interactive Elements

- **Buttons**: 
  - "Upgrade Now" (purple gradient)
  - "Preview", "PDF", "Download" (top right)
  - "Add Skill" (right sidebar)
- **Input Fields**: Various text inputs and textareas in the right sidebar
- **Tabs**: Content/Design/Templates tabs
- **Dropdown**: User profile menu
- **Rich Text Editor**: Formatting toolbar with interactive buttons
- **Skill Removal**: X buttons next to each skill
- **Progress Bars**: Visual skill level indicators
- **Navigation Items**: All sidebar menu items are clickable
- **Status Indicator**: "Saved just now" shows recent activity

The interface provides a comprehensive resume building experience with real-time preview, editing capabilities, and multiple export options, all wrapped in a modern, professional design with careful attention to visual hierarchy and user experience.
